since_last: 58% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.25%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -2.58% · Gold +1.31% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 58% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.25%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.25%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +6.38%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +6.38%, LRCX +5.57%, KLAC +5.50%, TER +5.12%, AMAT +5.04%. Laggards: DDOG -4.41%, HON -2.00%, PUBM -1.55%, NOW -1.42%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.01% at $163.63
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.01% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
